content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Alternating Current". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/343/problem/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers representing the array.
content.outputFormat: The maximum sum of the alternating subsequence.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to calculate the maximum sum of the alternating subsequence.

code.Python3:
def maxAlternatingSum(arr):
    incl = arr[0]
    excl = 0
    for i in range(1, len(arr)):
        new_excl = incl if incl > excl else excl
        incl = excl + arr[i]
        excl = new_excl
    return incl if incl > excl else excl

n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
print(maxAlternatingSum(arr))
